## Summary
- What changed and why:

## Type Of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs

## Validation
- [ ] I ran targeted tests locally
- [ ] I ran `python -m compileall -q rml scripts`
- [ ] I attached relevant run/report artifacts (if behavior changed)

## RML-Specific Checklist
- [ ] Any new CSV fields are emitted in `rml/cli/train.py`
- [ ] `scripts/lineage_stats.py` handles new fields (or explicitly ignores them)
- [ ] `rml_lab_log.md` entry added for meaningful behavior changes
- [ ] Claim boundaries updated in docs if conclusions changed
